checks.requirement: 50 ohm controlled RF trace from DWM3000 pin 23 to SMA
checks.recommendation: Preserve the specified microstrip geometry and keep the RF path free of vias, probes, and components.

checks.requirement: Dense via stitching around SMA and RF section
checks.recommendation: Add explicit via fence coordinates during KiCad/PCBai placement export.
Keep AC/DC isolation, 3.3V buck, and 1.8V LDO as separate validated power stages.
Emit board keepout, silkscreen warning, and fabrication notes in the PCB exporter.
Keep fuse, MOV, TVS, and ferrite beads near entry and rail transition points.

checks.requirement: Required SPI and RTLS level shifters present
checks.recommendation: Constrain TXB0104 within 15mm and SN74LVC1T45 devices within 10mm of DWM3000 pins.

checks.requirement: SPI length matching and series resistors
checks.recommendation: During routing, constrain SPI length skew to 2mm and lock series resistors near ESP32 pins.
Place RTLS translators and pull/series resistors close to the DWM3000 edge.

checks.requirement: GPIO, I2C, UART, and power headers included
checks.recommendation: Keep expansion headers at board edges with readable silkscreen and ground return pins.
Exporter should place TP1-TP18 near accessible board edges and include them in CPL exclusions.

artifacts.name: AI Design Report
artifacts.description: Readable summary of design choices, checks, and next KiCad/PCBai actions.

artifacts.name: Validation Report
artifacts.description: DRC/ERC/DFM/DFA-oriented checklist for the UWB anchor constraints.

artifacts.description: PCBWay-compatible package structure with BOM and CPL placeholders.
